goal: Every M2–M5 surface passes the design quality bar — all interactive elements have loading/empty/error/confirm states, layouts hold at 375px and 1440px, a11y is clean, and EL/EN copy is complete with no missing keys or English leak in Greek mode.
why: M4/M5 (booking, incoming bookings, reminders, admin review) were shipped via a fast parallel workflow — build-verified but not exhaustively polished. The audit found three real gap classes: data mutations that silently swallow failures, raw-ISO date display breaking visual consistency, and optimistic admin actions with no failure recovery.
success_criteria: Every interactive M4/M5 mutation surface renders an error state on failure (booking, reminder prefs + dismiss, admin approve/reject) — verified by inspection.
requested_date renders as dd/mm/yyyy on /book and /bookings, matching ServiceLog/MechanicLog/RemindersList.
EL/EN string parity holds at 218/218 (no new keys added); Translation type unchanged.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0; no TODO/FIXME introduced in touched files.
No raw hex / non-semantic colors introduced in any touched component.
No layout break at 375px or 1440px on any M2–M5 route — pre-satisfied per audit; guarded by the no-fixed-pixel-width regression check.

tasks.title: Booking surfaces: add missing error feedback + canonical date format
acceptance_criteria: Owner 'My bookings' list shows requested_date as dd/mm/yyyy, not raw ISO.
Workshop incoming-bookings list shows requested_date as dd/mm/yyyy.
A booking with a note shows that note in the owner's My bookings row.
No new i18n keys; el/en stays 218/218; tsc passes.
tasks.action: Add a local formatDate(iso) helper (identical to RemindersList.tsx:10-13) to BookingForm.tsx and IncomingBookings.tsx; apply at BookingForm.tsx:205 (b.requested_date) and IncomingBookings.tsx:102 (booking.requested_date), inside the existing truthy guards. In BookingForm.tsx My-bookings li, add a text-muted note line {b.note ? ... : null}. No new i18n keys; semantic tokens only.

tasks.title: Reminder surfaces: add error states to prefs save + reminder dismiss
acceptance_criteria: Reminder-prefs save failure shows a text-negative error; success still shows reminderPrefsSaved.
Reminder dismiss failure shows a text-negative error instead of silently doing nothing.
No new i18n keys: reuse t.errSave; el/en stays 218/218.
tasks.action: In ReminderPrefs.tsx add an error branch after the state.ok block reusing the SettingsClient.tsx:131-138 ok/error pattern (t.errSave). In RemindersList.tsx change const [, action, pending] to capture state and render an inline t.errSave error on failure, matching IncomingBookings.tsx:242-246. If widening returned state to carry error, update the server-action failure/success branches accordingly (not i18n strings). Do not alter revalidatePath calls.

tasks.title: Admin review: surface failures from optimistic approve/reject
acceptance_criteria: approveWorkshop/rejectWorkshop returning {ok:false} shows a text-negative role=alert banner reusing t.errSave.
Success path unchanged: row removed and revalidated list reconciles.
No new i18n keys; el/en stays 218/218.
tasks.action: Add useState actionError to AdminReviewList.tsx. In onApprove and onConfirmReject, capture the action promise result via .then((res)=>{ if(res && !res.ok) setActionError(true); }) and reset setActionError(false) at the start of each. Render a role=alert bg-negative/10 text-negative banner near the header (signup/page.tsx:94-101 shape) reusing t.errSave. Keep useOptimistic reconciliation intact.
